note: Repository is on Codacy Cloud and assigned to org coding standard 'rknightion-standard' (id 159741). Per explicit guardrails, no org standard, tool, or pattern changes were made and the repo was not unassigned. Tuning was limited to repo-local file exclusions via a committed .codacy.yaml, which Codacy Cloud honours from the default branch.
keyImprovements: Added repo-local .codacy.yaml excluding docs, test/tests dirs (incl. nested), vendor, and generated paths — matches the rknightion cross-repo convention and removes the largest noise sources (mkdocs markdown, test code) from analysis on Cloud.

Confirmed the org standard already enforces the modern toolset (Ruff, ESLint9, Opengrep, Bandit, Trivy, Lizard, Hadolint, ShellCheck, Stylelint, markdownlint) with no legacy linters re-enabled — left untouched.
No org coding standard, tool, or pattern was modified, and the repo remains assigned to rknightion-standard (id 159741).
codacyYaml:
---
# Codacy repository configuration (https://docs.codacy.com/repositories-configure/codacy-configuration-file/)
# Repo-LOCAL config only. Tools and patterns are governed by the org coding standard
# "rknightion-standard" (id 159741) — do not redefine engines/tools here.
# This file only narrows WHAT gets analysed, to reduce noise. Codacy Cloud reads it
# from the default branch.
exclude_paths:
  - "docs/**"
  - "test/**"
  - "tests/**"
  - "**/tests/**"
  - "**/*_test.go"
  - "vendor/**"
  - "generated/**"
  - "**/generated/**"
